title: mecosorus elongatus
intro: Mecosorus elongatus, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or prickly poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The medicinal properties of Mecosorus elongatus have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Mecosorus elongatus can be made from the roots, leaves, and seeds, and are often used as a tincture or infusion in traditional medicine.
